title: leionema bilobum subsp. serrulatum
intro: Leionema bilobum subsp. serrulatum, also known as Serrulate Leionema, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to eastern Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Leionema bilobum subsp. serrulatum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from various skin conditions. Leionema bilobum subsp. serrulatum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
